get.summary: Gets a single article by guid
get.description: Retrieves a single article by its unique identifier. Optionally allows querying historical data using temporal tables.

patch.summary: Updates part of an existing article
patch.description: Updates only article fields included in the request body.

delete.description: Deletes the specified article from the system.

get.summary: Gets a single article by barcode
get.description: Retrieves a single article by barcode and barcode type using the {barcode}:{type} route value.
Retrieves a paginated list of articles. Supports optional temporal queries and partition filters, including public articles without partitions.

post.description: Creates a new article with optional partitions, barcodes, and active state. Returns the generated identifier.

get.description: Retrieves a single item by its unique identifier. Optionally allows querying historical data using temporal tables.

put.description: Replaces mutable item state including partitions and parent container.

delete.description: Deletes the specified item from the system.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of items. Supports optional temporal queries and partition filters, including public items without partitions.

post.description: Creates a new item with optional partitions. Returns the generated identifier.

get.description: Retrieves a single user by its unique identifier. Optionally allows querying historical data using temporal tables.

put.description: Replaces all user state including partitions, user groups, and permissions.

delete.description: Deletes the specified user from the system.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of users. Supports optional temporal queries and partition filters, including public users without partitions.

post.description: Creates a new user with optional partitions, user groups, and permissions. Returns the generated identifier.

get.description: Retrieves a single user group by its unique identifier. Optionally allows querying historical data using temporal tables.

put.description: Replaces all user group state including partitions and permissions.

delete.description: Deletes the specified user group from the system.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of user groups. Supports optional temporal queries and partition filters, including public user groups without partitions.

post.description: Creates a new user group with optional partitions and permissions. Returns the generated identifier.

get.description: Retrieves a single partition by its unique identifier. Optionally allows querying historical data using temporal tables.

put.description: Updates partition properties. Only fields provided in the body are applied; null fields are ignored.

delete.description: Deletes the specified partition from the system. The global partition cannot be deleted.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of partitions. Supports optional temporal queries.

post.description: Creates a new partition under an optional parent (defaults to the global partition). Returns the generated identifier.
Validates user credentials and returns an access token and refresh token.
Invalidates the current refresh token or session.
Uses a valid refresh token to generate a new access token.

put.summary: Changes the password of the authenticated user
put.description: Validates the current password and updates it with the new password.
